description: Thrust a blade at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage. Deals up to 300% more damage to enemies below 25% Health.
name: Assassin's Blade

description: Thrust a blade at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage. Deals up to 300% more damage to enemies below 25% Health. Heals you if the enemy dies within 2 seconds.
name: Killer's Blade

description: Thrust a blade at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage. Deals up to 300% more damage to enemies below 25% Health. Increased range.
name: Impale

description: Flash through the shadows to appear at an enemy's location and strike them, dealing Magic Damage and stunning them for 1 second.
name: Teleport Strike

description: Flash through the shadows and deal Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies. Afflicts enemies with Minor Vulnerability, increasing damage taken by 5% for 10 seconds.
name: Lotus Fan

description: Flash through the shadows to appear at an enemy's location and strike them, dealing Magic Damage. Grants Empower, increasing damage of your next Heavy Attack by 80%.
name: Ambush

description: Surround yourself in a phantasmic aura, granting Major Evasion for 26 seconds, reducing damage from area attacks by 20%.
name: Blur

description: Surround yourself in a phantasmic aura, granting Major Evasion and Minor Resolve for 26 seconds, reducing damage from area attacks by 20% and increasing Physical and Spell Resistance.
name: Mirage

description: Surround yourself in a phantasmic aura, granting Major Evasion and Major Expedition for 26 seconds, reducing damage from area attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30%.
name: Double Take

description: Mark an enemy, exposing them to attacks for 30 seconds. Marked enemy takes 10% increased damage from you. You heal when the marked enemy dies.
name: Mark Target

description: Mark an enemy, exposing them to attacks for 30 seconds. Marked enemy takes 10% increased damage from you. Prevents the enemy from going invisible and heals you when they die.
name: Piercing Mark

description: Mark an enemy, exposing them to attacks for 30 seconds. Marked enemy takes 10% increased damage from you. Grants Major Berserk when the marked enemy dies, increasing damage done by 10%.
name: Reaper's Mark

description: Gain Minor Berserk for 20 seconds, increasing damage done by 5%. While active, hitting with 5 Light or Heavy Attacks converts this ability to Spectral Bow.
name: Grim Focus

description: Gain Minor Berserk for 20 seconds. While active, hitting with 5 Light or Heavy Attacks converts this to Assassin's Will, dealing increased damage and restoring Magicka.
name: Merciless Resolve

description: Gain Minor Berserk and Minor Endurance for 20 seconds. While active, hitting with 5 Light or Heavy Attacks converts this to Assassin's Scourge, which heals you on hit.
name: Relentless Focus

description: Ravage an enemy with a swift strike, dealing Magic Damage and afflicting them with Trauma for 6 seconds, reducing their healing received by 30%.
name: Death Stroke

description: Ravage an enemy with a swift strike, dealing Magic Damage and applying Trauma for 6 seconds. Stuns the target for 3 seconds if they are below 25% Health. Reduced cost.
name: Incapacitating Strike

description: Ravage an enemy with a swift strike, dealing Magic Damage and applying Trauma for 6 seconds. Grants 10 Ultimate when you kill an enemy while slotted.
name: Soul Harvest

description: Increases Weapon and Spell Damage while invisible or in stealth. Increases duration of stuns against enemies by 20%.
name: Master Assassin

description: Restores Magicka and Stamina when you kill an enemy with an Assassination ability.
name: Executioner

description: Increases Critical Strike Chance for each Assassination ability slotted.
name: Pressure Points

description: Increases Critical Damage done for each Assassination ability slotted.
name: Hemorrhage

description: Cloak yourself in shadow, becoming invisible for 3 seconds. Breaks on taking damage or using an ability.
name: Shadow Cloak

description: Cloak yourself in shadow, becoming invisible for 3 seconds. Your next direct damage attack made from stealth is a guaranteed Critical Strike.
name: Shadowy Disguise

description: Cloak yourself in shadow for 3 seconds. While cloaked, heal yourself and remove up to 3 negative effects.
name: Dark Cloak

description: Thrust a blade through the shadows at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage and setting them Off Balance. Stuns for 4 seconds if used from stealth or invisibility.
name: Veiled Strike

description: Thrust a blade through the shadows at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage and setting them Off Balance. Increases movement speed while invisible. Deals increased damage from stealth.
name: Concealed Weapon

description: Thrust a blade through the shadows at an enemy, dealing Physical Damage and setting them Off Balance. Applies Major Breach, reducing armor. Stuns from stealth.
name: Surprise Attack

description: Create a corridor of shadows for 10 seconds. You and allies walking on the path gain Major Expedition, increasing movement speed by 30%.
name: Path of Darkness

description: Create a corridor of shadows for 10 seconds. You and allies walking on the path gain Major Expedition. The path also deals Magic Damage over time to enemies.
name: Twisting Path

description: Create a corridor of shadows for 10 seconds. You and allies walking on the path gain Major Expedition and are healed over time while on the path.
name: Refreshing Path

description: Unleash a dark specter to terrify up to 2 nearby enemies, causing them to cower in fear for 4 seconds.
name: Aspect of Terror

description: Unleash a dark specter to terrify up to 6 nearby enemies, causing them to cower in fear for 4 seconds. Reduced cost.
name: Mass Hysteria

description: Place 2 traps at your location. Enemies who trigger a trap are feared for 4 seconds. Traps last 1 minute.
name: Manifestation of Terror

description: Summon a shade at target location for 20 seconds. The shade attacks nearby enemies and applies Minor Maim, reducing their damage done by 5%.
name: Summon Shade

description: Summon a shade at target location for 20 seconds. The shade attacks nearby enemies, dealing increased damage and applying Minor Maim.
name: Dark Shade

description: Summon a shade at target location for 20 seconds. The shade applies Minor Maim. Activating again teleports you to the shade's location.
name: Shadow Image

description: Create an area of darkness for 12 seconds that applies Major Protection to you and allies, reducing damage taken by 10%. You are invisible while in the area.
name: Consuming Darkness

description: Create an area of darkness for 12 seconds that applies Major Protection to you and allies. You are invisible while in the area. Allies also receive Minor Protection.
name: Bolstering Darkness

description: Create an area of darkness for 12 seconds that applies Major Protection and deals Magic Damage to enemies inside every second. You are invisible while in the area.
name: Veil of Blades

description: Increases Stamina Recovery for each Shadow ability slotted.
name: Refreshing Shadows

description: Gain Major Resolve when exiting stealth or invisibility, increasing Physical and Spell Resistance.
name: Shadow Barrier

description: Increases Max Health for each Shadow ability slotted.
name: Dark Vigor

description: Increases duration of Shadow abilities by 2 seconds.
name: Dark Veil

description: Steal an enemy's life force, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds and healing you every 2 seconds.
name: Strife

description: Steal an enemy's life force, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds. Heals you and a nearby ally every 2 seconds.
name: Funnel Health

description: Steal an enemy's life force, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds. Heals you every 2 seconds. Initial hit deals additional damage.
name: Swallow Soul

description: Cause an enemy to writhe in agony, stunning them for 1.5 seconds and dealing Magic Damage over 20 seconds.
name: Agony

description: Cause an enemy to writhe in agony, stunning them for 1.5 seconds and dealing Magic Damage over 20 seconds. Spreads to nearby enemies when target dies.
name: Malefic Wreath

description: Cause an enemy to writhe in agony, stunning them for 1.5 seconds and dealing Magic Damage over 20 seconds. Applies Major Cowardice, reducing Weapon and Spell Damage.
name: Prolonged Suffering

description: Sap an enemy's agility, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds and applying Major Expedition to you while slowing the enemy by 30%.
name: Cripple

description: Sap an enemy's agility, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds and applying Major Expedition to you while slowing the enemy by 30%. Restores Magicka each tick.
name: Debilitate

description: Sap an enemy's agility, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds, applying Major Expedition to you, and rooting the enemy in place for 1.5 seconds.
name: Crippling Grasp

description: Embrace the powers of darkness, gaining a portion of your Max Health, Magicka, and Stamina back each time you deal damage with a Light or Heavy Attack for 20 seconds.
name: Siphoning Strikes

description: Embrace the powers of darkness for 20 seconds, restoring Magicka and Stamina with each Light or Heavy Attack. Restore additional resources when the effect ends.
name: Siphoning Attacks

description: Embrace the powers of darkness for 20 seconds, restoring Health and Stamina with each Light or Heavy Attack. Restore additional resources when the effect ends.
name: Leeching Strikes

description: Steal the life force from nearby enemies, dealing Magic Damage. Gain Major Brutality and Sorcery for each enemy hit, increasing Weapon and Spell Damage by 20% for 20 seconds.
name: Drain Power

description: Steal the life force from nearby enemies, dealing Physical Damage. Gain Major Brutality and Sorcery for each enemy hit. Enemies are afflicted with Minor Cowardice.
name: Power Extraction

description: Steal the life force from nearby enemies, dealing Magic Damage and healing you for each enemy hit. Gain Major Brutality and Sorcery for each enemy hit.
name: Sap Essence

description: Rend the souls of nearby enemies, dealing Magic Damage and stunning them for 4 seconds. Allies can activate Soul Leech synergy to deal damage and heal.
name: Soul Shred

description: Rend the souls of nearby enemies, dealing Magic Damage and stunning them for 4 seconds. Heals you and nearby allies. Allies can activate Soul Leech synergy.
name: Soul Siphon

description: Rend the souls of nearby enemies, dealing Magic Damage and stunning them for 4 seconds. Tethered enemies take additional damage over time and you heal for each enemy tethered.
name: Soul Tether

description: Increases effectiveness of potions by 10%. Grants Ultimate when drinking a potion.
name: Catalyst

description: Increases Max Magicka for each Siphoning ability slotted.
name: Magicka Flood

description: Increases healing done for each Siphoning ability slotted.
name: Soul Siphoner

description: Generates 2 Ultimate when dealing damage with a Siphoning ability.
name: Transfer

description: Command a cliff racer to dive bomb an enemy, dealing Magic Damage.
name: Dive

description: Command a cliff racer to dive bomb an enemy, dealing Physical Damage. Applies a bleed, dealing Physical Damage over 6 seconds.
name: Cutting Dive

description: Command a cliff racer to dive bomb an enemy, dealing Magic Damage. Deals up to 50% more damage based on distance to target.
name: Screaming Cliff Racer

description: Stir a group of shalk that burst from the ground after 3 seconds, dealing Magic Damage to enemies in front of you.
name: Scorch

description: Stir a group of shalk that burst from the ground after 3 seconds, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in front of you. Applies Major Breach, reducing armor for 10 seconds.
name: Subterranean Assault

description: Stir a group of shalk that burst from the ground after 3 seconds, dealing Magic Damage to enemies in front of you. Applies Major Breach, reducing armor for 10 seconds.
name: Deep Fissure

description: Call a swarm of fetcherflies to attack an enemy, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds. Applies Minor Vulnerability, increasing their damage taken by 5%.
name: Swarm

description: Call a swarm of fetcherflies to attack an enemy, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds. Applies Minor Vulnerability. Transfers to a nearby enemy when target dies.
name: Growing Swarm

description: Call a swarm of fetcherflies to attack an enemy, dealing Magic Damage over 10 seconds. Applies Minor Vulnerability. Final tick deals increased damage.
name: Fetcher Infection

description: Call a betty netch to your side for 25 seconds. The netch restores Magicka over time and grants Major Brutality and Sorcery, increasing Weapon and Spell Damage by 20%.
name: Betty Netch

description: Call a betty netch to your side for 25 seconds. The netch restores Magicka over time and grants Major Brutality and Sorcery. Removes 1 negative effect when summoned.
name: Blue Betty

description: Call a bull netch to your side for 25 seconds. The netch restores Stamina over time and grants Major Brutality and Sorcery, increasing Weapon and Spell Damage by 20%.
name: Bull Netch

description: Invoke the spirit of a falcon, granting Major Expedition and Minor Endurance for 10 seconds, increasing movement speed by 30% and Stamina Recovery by 15%.
name: Falcon's Swiftness

description: Invoke the spirit of a falcon, granting Major Expedition, Minor Endurance, and Minor Evasion for 10 seconds, increasing movement speed and Stamina Recovery while reducing area damage taken.
name: Deceptive Predator

description: Invoke the spirit of a falcon, granting Major Expedition, Minor Endurance, and Minor Berserk for 10 seconds, increasing movement speed, Stamina Recovery, and damage done.
name: Bird of Prey

description: Call a ferocious war bear to fight by your side. The bear bites enemies for Physical Damage and executes enemies below 25% Health. Can reactivate to command the bear to maul an enemy.
name: Feral Guardian

description: Call a ferocious war bear to fight by your side. The bear bites enemies for Physical Damage and executes enemies below 25% Health. The bear respawns automatically when killed.
name: Eternal Guardian

description: Call a ferocious war bear to fight by your side. The bear bites enemies for Magic Damage and executes enemies below 25% Health. Bear damage scales with your Max Magicka.
name: Wild Guardian

description: When one of your Animal Companions abilities ends, heal yourself.
name: Bond with Nature

description: Increases your Ultimate generation when you use an Animal Companions ability.
name: Savage Beast

description: Increases Magicka and Stamina Recovery for each Animal Companions ability slotted.
name: Flourish

description: Increases damage done by Animal Companions abilities.
name: Advanced Species

description: Grow a fungal bloom that heals you and nearby allies.
name: Fungal Growth

description: Grow a fungal bloom that heals you and nearby allies. Grants Minor Intellect and Minor Endurance, increasing Magicka and Stamina Recovery.
name: Enchanted Growth

description: Grow a fungal bloom that heals you and nearby allies. Heals for increased amount on allies below 50% Health.
name: Soothing Spores

description: Plant a healing seed at target location, healing allies in the area over 6 seconds. Allies can activate the Harvest synergy to heal themselves.
name: Healing Seed

description: Plant a healing seed at target location, healing allies in the area over 6 seconds. Activating again triggers the synergy early, healing allies and granting Minor Vitality.
name: Budding Seeds

description: Plant a healing seed at target location, healing allies over 6 seconds. Also damages enemies in the area and applies Major Defile, reducing their healing received.
name: Corrupting Pollen

description: Grow vines that embrace you or the lowest Health ally in front of you for 10 seconds. The vines heal the target each time they take damage.
name: Living Vines

description: Grow vines that embrace you or the lowest Health ally in front of you for 10 seconds. The vines heal the target each time they take damage and apply Minor Lifesteal to attackers.
name: Leeching Vines

description: Grow vines that embrace you or the lowest Health ally in front of you for 10 seconds. The vines heal the target each time they take damage. Burst heals when the effect ends.
name: Living Trellis

description: Embrace the lotus blessing for 20 seconds. While active, your Light and Heavy Attacks heal you or a nearby ally.
name: Lotus Flower

description: Embrace the lotus blessing for 20 seconds. While active, your Light and Heavy Attacks heal you or a nearby ally. Grants Major Savagery and Prophecy, increasing critical chance.
name: Green Lotus

description: Embrace the lotus blessing for 20 seconds. While active, your Light and Heavy Attacks heal you or a nearby ally. Healing is increased and costs Stamina.
name: Lotus Blossom

description: Launch a vine at an ally, healing them and pulling you to their location. Grants Minor Expedition, increasing movement speed.
name: Nature's Grasp

description: Launch a vine at an ally, healing them and pulling you to their location. Grants Minor Expedition. Heals the target again when you arrive.
name: Nature's Embrace

description: Launch a vine at an ally, healing them instantly for a larger amount. Does not pull you to their location. Grants Minor Expedition.
name: Bursting Vines

description: Create a forest of healing at your location. You and allies in the area are healed every 1 second for 6 seconds and cleansed of negative effects.
name: Secluded Grove

description: Create a forest of healing at your location. You and allies in the area are healed every 1 second for 6 seconds. Healing is increased on allies below 50% Health.
name: Enchanted Forest

description: Create a forest of healing at your location. You and allies in the area are healed every 1 second for 6 seconds. Forest moves towards your target ally over the duration.
name: Healing Thicket

description: When you heal yourself or an ally with a Green Balance ability while under 50% Health, gain Major Mending, increasing healing done by 16% for 4 seconds.
name: Accelerated Growth

description: When you heal yourself or an ally with a Green Balance ability, restore Magicka. This effect can occur once every 3 seconds.
name: Nature's Gift

description: Increases healing received for each Green Balance ability slotted.
name: Emerald Moss

description: When you heal yourself or an ally with a Green Balance ability, grant Minor Toughness for 20 seconds, increasing Max Health.
name: Maturation

description: Wrap a cloak of frost around you and nearby allies, granting Major Resolve for 20 seconds, increasing Physical and Spell Resistance.
name: Frost Cloak

description: Wrap a cloak of frost around you and nearby allies, granting Major Resolve and Minor Protection for 20 seconds, increasing resistances and reducing damage taken.
name: Ice Fortress

description: Wrap a cloak of frost around you and nearby allies, granting Major Resolve for 20 seconds. Increased radius and duration.
name: Expansive Frost Cloak

description: Summon icy shards around you, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 12 seconds. Enemies in the area are slowed by 30%.
name: Impaling Shards

description: Summon icy shards at target location, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 12 seconds. Enemies in the area are immobilized for 3 seconds.
name: Gripping Shards

description: Summon icy shards at target location, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 12 seconds. Enemies in the area are slowed by 30%. Increased damage.
name: Winter's Revenge

description: Envelop yourself in a healing frost, instantly healing yourself and gaining Major Resolve for 20 seconds.
name: Arctic Wind

description: Envelop yourself in a healing frost, instantly healing yourself and gaining Major Resolve for 20 seconds. Also heals a nearby ally for the same amount.
name: Polar Wind

description: Envelop yourself in a healing frost, instantly healing yourself and dealing Frost Damage over 5 seconds to nearby enemies. Stuns enemies at the end of the duration.
name: Arctic Blast

description: Conjure icy orbs around you that absorb projectiles for 6 seconds. Each orb absorbs one projectile. Gain Minor Vitality, increasing healing received.
name: Crystallized Shield

description: Conjure icy orbs around you that absorb projectiles for 6 seconds. Each orb absorbs one projectile and returns Frost Damage to the attacker. Gain Minor Vitality.
name: Crystallized Slab

description: Conjure icy orbs around you that absorb projectiles for 6 seconds. Each orb absorbed generates Ultimate. Gain Minor Vitality.
name: Shimmering Shield

description: Summon an ancient portal at target location. The first enemy to pass through is teleported to you and immobilized. Portal lasts 30 seconds.
name: Frozen Gate

description: Summon an ancient portal at target location. The first enemy to pass through is teleported to you and immobilized. Portal lasts 30 seconds. Enemy takes Frost Damage on teleport.
name: Frozen Device

description: Summon an ancient portal at target location. Activating again teleports you and nearby allies to the portal location. Portal lasts 30 seconds.
name: Frozen Retreat

description: Twist a violent storm around you, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 8 seconds to enemies in the area. Reduces their Movement Speed by 70% and grants Major Protection.
name: Sleet Storm

description: Twist a violent storm around you, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 8 seconds. Reduces enemy Movement Speed and grants Major Protection. Increases Max Magicka while slotted.
name: Northern Storm

description: Twist a violent storm around you, dealing Frost Damage every 1 second for 8 seconds. Reduces enemy Movement Speed. Grants Major Protection. Stuns enemies when the effect ends.
name: Permafrost

description: Increases chance to apply Chilled to enemies with Winter's Embrace abilities.
name: Glacial Presence

description: Increases Physical and Spell Resistance for each Winter's Embrace ability slotted.
name: Frozen Armor

description: Reduces the cost of Block for each Winter's Embrace ability slotted.
name: Icy Aura

description: Increases damage done with Winter's Embrace abilities.
name: Piercing Cold
